use_cases: Toggle between different filter options in a data table or list view
Switch between view modes such as grid, list, or compact layouts
Select a single option from a set of related settings or preferences
Toggle features or options on and off in a settings panel
Switch between time periods or categories in a dashboard interface
ai_summary: Intent UI Toggle Group is a flexible, accessible form component for selecting one or more options from a grouped set of toggle buttons. Built on React Aria Components with Tailwind Variants, it supports horizontal and vertical orientations, multiple sizes, and gap configurations. The component provides a clean, minimalist interface suitable for filtering, mode switching, and preference selection across SaaS applications and general web interfaces.
